text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(The aura I felt from her… was like that 
of an unfathomable monstrosity…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …This is ridiculous. I emerged victorious in the end!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Whyever should I be fearful of her…?

After running the track with that trainee I wasn't 
familiar with, Admire Groove left.
choice_data_list: I get the feeling something's bothering her.
I get the feeling something's bothering her.

text_block_list.text:
She had won their race with a decent margin. 
Even so, she cut an irritated figure as I watched 
her depart.
LOST…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Her Signal… is becoming LOST…

If I'm not mistaken, this girl is Neo Universe. One of Admire 
Groove's peers who debuted around the same time… and a 
promising prospect in her own right.
choice_data_list: Her signal is… lost…? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Her soul… is going astray…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps Admire Groove struggles to Reach… 
CONT must be restored.

Without responding to any further form of communication, 
Neo Universe walked off and disappeared.
choice_data_list: What… did she want to tell me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: …Oh? Could I have a word, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Who else would I be addressing? You, you've conversed 
with Admire Groove, haven't you? I saw you two earlier.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Whatever the case, do you know if anything happened to her? 
I caught sight of her just earlier, and she… seemed to be 
in a rather strange mood.

I responded by telling her about the race I had just witnessed, 
noting that I didn't know much more than that…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Hmm. Essentially, you're saying she ran a race with 
someone and won… That's not much to go on.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Oh well. If you notice anything else in the future, 
please come talk to me.
choice_data_list: You're really concerned with her, huh.
You're really concerned with her, huh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…Hmm. I know her a little, but we don't have a particular 
relationship, really… Still, I can't shake these thou—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
…No, forget that, I'm just talking to myself. 
In any case, do let me know if something happens, will you?

My head was swirling with thoughts, repeating everything 
that happened today.

Admire Groove's untraceable irritation after winning a race. 
The meaning behind the word "lost", which Neo Universe had 
used to describe her.

Air Groove, and her peculiar interest in Admire Groove. 
How exactly do all these things link together?
choice_data_list: Think as I might, I… just don't know.

text_block_list.text:
Perhaps all these thoughts were the reason for the strange 
dream I had when I drifted off to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Admire Groove!! Her arm raised to her chest, her fist clenched! 
First place is firmly in her grasp!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Admire Groove narrowly beats Still in Love to take 
her first G1 victory at the Queen Elizabeth Cup…!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You have your vengeance — at last.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…When I thought I had lost everything I had… you were 
the one who reached out to me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
All the things you have given me… have kept me going. 
I feel them coursing through me, in my legs… in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph… Hearing you say that after the handful you've been is very touching. But, well… you really, really did very well.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……Thank you…!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Hahh… haah… That dream again…!

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(The triple tiara… the Queen Elizabeth Cup… 
Having everything taken from me again…)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(My honor, my confidence, even my future… nothing remains! 
Just how long must I suffer these nightmares for…!?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(A simple victory wasn't enough. They wouldn't stop. 
There must be something… deeper down.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
(A certain… fear… grips me when I think of that girl. 
I must rid myself of this emotion, at any cost…)

I returned to the track the next day, my mind still caught up 
on that night's dream. A trainee was training in isolation, 
her face showing a rather menacing expression.
choice_data_list:
Good work. You look like you're 
committed to something.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: Haah… haaah… I just had a bad dream, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: …Really a nasty "dream"… Why must it return again and again and again…! The tiara, everything after it… why do they all… why does she take everything from me…!
choice_data_list: <size=38>After it…? You mean the Queen Elizabeth Cup?</size>

text_block_list.text:
Did she have a similar dream as me? That would be interesting. 
Though, judging from her words… things didn't turn out quite 
as positive in hers.
choice_data_list: Were you dreaming about… Still in Love?

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text: ……How do you ——
choice_data_list: <size=32>Ah, I… just thought I saw you two race the other day…</size>

text_block_list.text:
Thinking she'd just find me strange if I told her I'd seen them 
in a dream, I quickly tried to gloss over the subject.

text_block_list.name: Admire Groove
text_block_list.text:
…! In any case… it has nothing to do with you. 
Please excuse me, I have more training to do.

The triple tiara and the Queen Elizabeth Cup appeared 
in both of our dreams. Is it really simply coincidence 
that they were so similar…?

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Confirmed Excitation of Vision Windows… 
In you… and Admire Groove.
choice_data_list: …! Hey, I wanted to ask you someth—
…! Hey, I wanted to ask you someth—

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Yours reflects… Restoration. 
Admire Groove can… Reach.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Yet… the Ether is… Unstable. A Window is trying… to close. 
Observation will be… disrupted.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
…Admire Groove's Window reflects Loss… 
Admire Groove… will not Reach…

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
…Signal close to LOST. The Ether is dense… 
Observed Intensity… high.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: CONT of Admire Groove's Soul… Failing. Restoration required. …Do not close your Vision Window.
